project.name: DDLSim-Lab
project.description: Autonomous Testbed for Deterministic Networking & eBPF Telemetry. Analyzing microsecond-level jitter in global Edge-Cloud continuums.

funding_goals.title: DDLSim-Lab Private Testbed Construction
funding_goals.description: Procurement of specialized high-performance bare-metal hardware and network equipment for dedicated project benchmarking.

funding_goals.title: International Testbed Integration
funding_goals.description: Operational costs for bridging DDLSim-Lab with global research infrastructures and managing high-bandwidth telemetry data.
